hero.title: Solutions that already work for your industry
hero.subtitle: We develop our own products that solve concrete problems. Ready to use, no development from scratch.

intro.title: Software ready for your business
intro.desc: Each Crystal product is built with the same quality we apply to custom development. Battle-tested in production, with local support and continuous improvements.

parkify.name: Parkify
parkify.tagline: Total control of your parking lot
parkify.desc: Complete system for parking lot management. Vehicle access control, hourly or subscription rates, real-time reports and operator app.

obsidian.name: Obsidian POS
obsidian.tagline: The POS that doesn't complicate things
obsidian.desc: Modern POS for retail businesses. Manage digital orders, inventory, cash register, and reports. No abusive monthly fees.
features: Cash register with multiple payment methods

mifit.name: Mifit
mifit.desc: Comprehensive management platform for gyms and fitness centers. Appointments, access control, payments, member tracking and routines.
features: Access control via QR or fingerprint
App for members with class follow-up

cta.title: None of them fit exactly?
cta.subtitle: We can customize them or build one from scratch for you.
